economic_notes: Investments in limited partnerships: MRDP (wind energy - Beaubassin Mi'kmaq Wind LP and Whynott's Mi'kmaq Wind LP), E'sukutimkewey LP (surf clam industry), ANSMC Cannabis Holdings Partnership (41% interest in Growforce AC Holdings). COVID-19 declared pandemic March 11, 2020 with Nova Scotia state of emergency March 22, 2020. RV Park under construction. Fisheries operations including commercial fishing and DFO-funded fisheries program.
notes: Audit qualified due to $600,000 intangible assets (fishing licenses) capitalized contrary to PSAS which requires expensing; accumulated surplus overstated by $600,000. Cheques issued in excess of funds on deposit of $712,366 results in negative cash position. CRA payable arrangement of $1,049,754 for unpaid employee remittances from prior years - classified as long-term. Three unaudited limited partnership investments not consolidated (MRDP wind energy, ELP surf clam, ANSMC cannabis). Potlotek Expedition Gas and Convenience consolidated as subsidiary. Net debt position of $10,735,798. Work in progress of $7,064,596 primarily roads/sewer/water treatment plant. Large deferred revenue balance of $3,588,575 mainly from water treatment plant funding. No schedule of remuneration provided in extracted text.
